title: cyclosorus remotipinnus
intro: Cyclosorus remotipinnus, also known as a fern species, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus remotipinnus include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various infections, as well as possessing anti-aging properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or extracts, which can be administered orally or topically to harness its therapeutic properties.
